description: Sorts a .snp file by Chromosome and location
author: Jim Robinson, David Twomey
plan:
## SNPFileSorter GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
SNPFileSorter is a GenePattern module that Sorts a .snp file by Chromosome and location

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 2 parameters:
- Required: snp.filename, output.file
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags>  -cp <libdir>snp.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-math-1.1.jar<path.separator><libdir>Jama-1.0.1.jar<path.separator><libdir>log4j-1.2.13.jar  edu.mit.broad.cg.util.SnpDataSorter <snp.filename> <output.file>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation
